llm.reason: Proper noun: Arctic/Arthik - ambiguous but likely place reference
Proper noun: Arkay (of king/royal, but often used as name)
Proper noun: Arayi (of Ara, Armenian mythological figure)
Proper noun: Sayat (Armenian personal name, as in Sayat-Nova)
Proper noun: Aslan (personal name, Turkish origin)
Proper noun: Ishkhan (Armenian personal name, though also means 'prince')
Proper noun: Beria (personal name, Soviet figure)
Vulgar: to vomit (unpleasant for daily puzzle)
